##LOCALITY=Redmond mine, Haywood County, North Carolina, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless but sometimes light reddish brown ubiquitously twinned tablets in association with hydroredmondite, steverustite, sulfatoredmondite, and susannite. Type sample, described in Kampf et al (2024)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250115
